title: Phase Unwrapping Noisy-Coherence Spec (InSAR family)

E.forward: psi = wrap(phi + n); coherence map gamma(r) provided
E.inverse: recover phi in R^{HxW} from wrapped phase and coherence

d_spec_notes: Distance from 3D/temporal phase unwrap spec ~= 0.30 (Similar — different integration axis). Phase unwrapping is topologically different from other inverse problems (integer ambiguity).

s1_s4_justifications.S1: Dimensions: psi and phi share HxW grid; coherence in [0,1].
s1_s4_justifications.S2: Unique up to constant under Itoh condition; MCF/branch-cut guarantee discrete integer k(r).
s1_s4_justifications.S3: LS-DCT closed-form O(HW log); MCF polynomial-time (Goldberg-Tarjan); deep methods feed-forward.
s1_s4_justifications.S4: epsilon_fn defined; PhaseNet fails at T4 (discontinuity_fraction=0.3 + coherence=0.1).
